card_eligibility.source_phrase: Residents of North Andover : New borrowers are asked to show photo identification and proof of their North Andover address before they are issued a Stevens library card.
card_eligibility.source_block:
Residents of North Andover : New borrowers are asked to show photo identification and proof of their North Andover address before they are issued a Stevens library card. A parent or legal guardian must sign the registration form and co-sign the library card of any child under 12.

Residents of towns whose libraries belong to the Merrimack Valley Library Consortium : Patrons who live in another MVLC community can receive a MVLC card OR can use the ecard registration to get a home library card.

Massachusetts residents outside of the Merrimack Valley Library Consortium (MVLC) may either cross-register their other Massachusetts network card or be issued an MVLC card. A patron must have a photo ID (i.e. license, etc.) proving MA residence and complete a registration form.
